title: Integrate first wave (D-002 sequential integration) and prepare second wave
applicability_note: CTRL requirements (task_ids=[M0-T026]) are the controller deliverables of the D-003 integration+second-wave control task, verified at its gate. POST requirements (task_ids=[M0-T026-POSTMERGE], a non-ledger sentinel) are the sequenced integration actions (per-PR exact-head review, gates, one-at-a-time accept/merge/ff, CI reruns, rebases, wave-2 worktrees) discharged over the run; they never block acceptance and are checked against primary repo evidence at the final independent directive verification (two-lane principle). The first-wave producer tasks M2-T017/M3-T001/M4-T007 are accepted through their own D-002 lifecycles.

owner_approval.decision: Integrate the three first-wave PRs one-at-a-time under the protected lifecycle; prepare a second blind-isolated wave.
authorizes: correction/rebase capsules to idle producers; a tiny controller-owned control amendment if needed
accept+merge #100/#101 only after rebase + green final-head CI + independent gates
contract a second wave from a new frozen main SHA + create fresh worktrees
prohibits: wiring the M2-T017 serializer into the builder outside a new integration task
modifying active producer worktrees from the controller
silently approving the B-011 construction-code draft
reusing old task branches/worktrees for new tasks

notes: D-003 is owner-issued (channel owner_message); 'active' reflects owner issuance.
First-wave producer-task acceptances flow through their D-002 lifecycles; D-003 governs the controller integration process + second-wave prep.
final_reviewed_* are populated at M0-T026's independent directive re-gate.

audit_log.note: Captured D-003 verbatim (source-001.md sha256 d9b01931) at frozen post-D-002 baseline cc14208; decomposed 28 requirements (10 CTRL / 18 POST). Remote facts independently reverified: main cc14208; #99 green, #100 red (context-budget + contracts), #101 red (web-e2e a11y).
